title: Option to share workspaces with board templates with non team members
excerpt: Would like to have the option to create and share templates and workspaces  with someone not in my team/account. For example, I am working on a course for entrepreneurs and would like to create a sharable template they c…

posts.author: RTSCollab (Ana)
posts.cookedHtml: Would like to have the option to create and share templates and workspaces with someone not in my team/account. For example, I am working on a course for entrepreneurs and would like to create a sharable template they can use for their business but I don’t want to have to add them to my team.

posts.author: GoodWork (Lisa Marshall)
posts.cookedHtml:
I can’t find the thread now but recently, like in the last 2 weeks, I saw a post saying something like this had been created and I even completed a workform to say I was interested in being a collaborator/posting my boards.

Where did that thread go?!

posts.author: aza.rose (Aza Rose)
posts.cookedHtml: Have you looked into the updated parent templates?
